/CAL:TO SET DA MTR/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM THIS INCIDENT MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN DOCKET NUMBER 18011778/CTORD:PROBATION IN#17008588 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/
